item.title: Special mama is a good girl
item.dc:creator: LosPer

item.title: Skip hand dryers- they are gross
item.description:
1..... (sound) Don’t use hand dryers- they are foul.
2..... Here’s another video where the scientist wafted the agar plate through the bathroom air. Interesting results.
3.....hand dryers are incubators of FILTH
4..... p.s. If you’re going to use paper in the bathroom to dry your hands, don’t use the first sheet that is hanging out in the breeze source: https://www.tiktok.com/@devonscience
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Explain this, humankind
item.description: Imagine this: a gift that’s not just a one-time gesture but a sustained act of care – a love letter service delivered monthly, complete with a poem, holographic sticker, and exclusive treasure. Gift it for up to a year – perfect for last-minute Christmas giving. No malls, no frantic scrolling, just handcrafted love mailed monthly. Make it happen: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas/gift
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Scottish Pokémon trainer Gloria
item.description:
"Why don't we have both?"
"I am... Scottish. I can complain about things, I can really complain about things now."
Hilda is my user pic on Windows, so this one and the next two are my favorites.
Dedicated to J.K. Rowling

item.title: A small Sunday dump for you <3
item.description:
Happens more often than you'd think! :'D
This resonates with me on a deep, personal level
Teach me senpai
Get yourself a SO that loves you the way this cat loves his cabbage
Sending some positive vibes
If you get your nails done, but you're in Wisconsin
I can't send this to my irl friends cause they may feel attacked
Sorry not sorry
The terror...
Ngl, its a plus in my book
Goodbye, have a lovely Sunday <3
item.dc:creator: walpurrga

item.title: Not a political pundit, but man could he throw a J-turn

item.title: Fresh(ish) Memes #411
item.dc:creator: ShaggyRoots

item.title: Kif, I have posted a meme dump. Inform the men!
item.description:
This graph greatly overstates how easy it is to get an interview.
Integer overflow. Not to be confused with imgur overflow.
I haven't seen the movie. I assume this to be Obi Wan's actual response. Anyone who tells me otherwise will face consequences.
ribbit
Hahaha, it's funny because everything is bad
Female Fanfic Ninja Turtles
I have a drinking problem.
I can't find a flaw in this logic.
Yes please.
Anyway, that's the new word I just invented.
See also: "This station does not endorse vigilante justice... unless it gets results! Which it will."
He sure is good looking though. Hard to believe he's single.
Laying in bed and thinking about your story ideas counts as writing, right?
Flesh and Blood TCG tax
item.dc:creator: BenjyX55

item.title: Always has been.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: Sunday dump, for the people
item.description:
Well played, kiddo
Step your proverbial weight up, gentlemen. Your SO deserves it
It was real, and it was spectacular. Halo for me :D
Hey that's...oh shit
Time may be a flat circle, but Earth got the girth
Just feels right
Lego junkies
Like Tenacious D
What an awkward time...at the therapists office
Goth through and through, but I loves me some whimsy
I've only ever prayed for one thing
Mismatched socks are a sign of greatness
We all have kryptonite
I see that as Michigan weather will travel
Mental health issues manifest physically, word to the wise
Family last name used to be Broggi- thanks Boston racism- but my guy...nevermind, woulda done the same lol
Always have...I'm a stickler that way
WANT
Wishing you all the very best this season!
The only war I'm interested in
item.dc:creator: GullahGullahIslander

item.title: This is the wrong timeline!
item.description: Excuse me, but I didn't think I'd be on a timeline where I'd be wholeheartedly agreeing with MITCH MCCONNELL. Jezus fkn cryst

item.dc:creator: wheyandcoffee

item.title: Just a Programmer Thing
item.description: The comment for the code showing that error was "I have no fucking clue.", and no one knew how to fix the issue or what was really causing it. Edit: I love how this turned into a Stack Overflow page. I appreciate you guys trying to help. I've long since left this place--I just thought it was a funny experience. The codebase for this thing was a mess and I was working on refactoring the whole thing while I was there to make it more maintainable and bring it up to date.
item.dc:creator: BlowOnItAndStickItIn

item.title: The abandoned Sega World. Fukushima, Japan.
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: New UnitedHealthcare CEO writes editorial in NYT and gets flooded with neg comments, which promptly get locked out
item.description: https://x.com/kenklippenstein/status/1867617063956582603 https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/ar-AA1vPue5 The New York Times turned off the comment section on the UnitedHealth CEO's op-ed after it became flooded with negative replies accusing the executive of empty promises. Andrew Witty, the CEO of UnitedHealth Group, mourned the loss of UnitedHeathCare CEO Brian Thompson in an editorial piece published by the New York Times Friday, while also offering sympathy to those frustrated with the healthcare system. But while Witty said that he was "willing to partner with anyone" to find ways to provide high-quality care at a lower cost, hundreds of readers mocked him, saying he offered no real solutions to the problem. Figures...
item.dc:creator: Castagere
